nasb.text: Then Baasha the son of Ahijah of the house of Issachar conspired against him, and Baasha struck him down at Gibbethon, which belonged to the Philistines, while Nadab and all Israel were laying siege to Gibbethon.

esv.text: Baasha the son of Ahijah, of the house of Issachar, conspired against him. And Baasha struck him down at Gibbethon, which belonged to the Philistines, for Nadab and all Israel were laying siege to Gibbethon.

cnv.text: 以薩迦家族亞希雅的兒子巴沙密謀背叛拿答。拿答和以色列眾人正在圍攻非利士地的基比頓的時候，巴沙在基比頓把拿答殺了。
